Title: Improved log(gf) Values for Lines of Ti I and Abundance Determinations 
       in the Photospheres of the Sun and Metal-Poor Star HD 84937 
       (Accurate Transition Probabilities for Ti I)
Authors: Lawler J.E., Guzman A., Wood M.P., Sneden C., Cowan J.J.
Table: Experimental Atomic Transition Probabilities for 948 lines of Ti I from
       upper odd-parity levels organized by increasing wavelength in air
================================================================================
Byte-by-byte Description of file: datafile3.txt
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Bytes Format Units    Label    Explanations
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   1- 10 F10.4  0.1nm    WaveAir  Wavelength in air; in Angstroms (1)
  12- 20 F9.3   cm-1     UpLev    Upper level from Saloman 2012
      22 I1     ---      UpJ      Upper level J value from Saloman 2012
  24- 32 F9.3   cm-1     LowLev   Lower level from Saloman 2012
      34 I1     ---      LowJ     Lower level J value from Saloman 2012
  36- 43 F8.4   10+6/s   TranP    Transition probability
  45- 51 F7.4   10+6/s e_TranP    Total uncertainty in TranP
  53- 57 F5.2   [-]      log(gf)  Log of degeneracy times oscillator strength
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Note (1): Computed from energy levels using the standard index of air from 
          Peck & Reeder (1972).
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
